item.title: Novenas you can start today - 20 May
item.description:
Blessed Gerardesca
Blessed Giles Dalmasia
Blessed Pope Paul VI
Blessed Richard Thirkeld
Martyrs Of Toulouse
Martyrs Of Trentino
Saint Bona Of Pisa
Saint Conon The Elder
Saint Conon The Younger
Saint Cyril Of Caesarea
Saint Daganus
Saint Eleutherius Of Rocca Darce
Saint Felix De Atares
Saint Gerald Of Macon
Saint Hesychius Of Antioch
Saint John De Atares
Saint Maximinus Of Trier
Saint Maximus Of Verona
Saint Restitutus Of Rome
Saint Senator Of Milan
Saint Theodosia Of Caesarea
Saint Ursula Ledochowska
Saint Votus De Atares

Feast Day: 29 May
Start Date: 20 May
End Date: 28 May
